emails.subject: Re: Resume,
emails.body: Molly, I would like to invite this student for an interview, sometimes in late December when things slow down. Interviews with all my direct reports and George Hopley. Vince Forwarded by Vince J Kaminski/HOU/ECT on 10/30/2000 09:58 AM Vince J Kaminski 10/24/2000 04:32 PM
